languages.original_text: "You and I have clashed more than once over such prohibitions, and now you have become their embodiment. How bizarre are the transformations wrought upon the minds of the ordained in the crucible of fate. I do not know where this path will lead you, but I hope that what you gain from it will be worth the sacrifice."

languages.text: "Мы не раз сталкивались с тобой на почве запретного, теперь же ты стал его воплощением. Сколь причудливы преобразования, творимые в тигле судьбы с разумами посвященных. Я не знаю куда заведет тебя этот путь, но надеюсь, что то, что ты на нем обретешь будет стоить того, чем ты пожертвовал".

"You and I have clashed more than once over such prohibitions, and now you have become their embodiment. How bizarre are the transformations wrought upon the minds of the ordained in the crucible of fate. I do not know where this path will lead you, but I hope that what you gain from it will be worth the sacrifice."

languages.text: «Usted y yo hemos discutido más de una vez sobre estas prohibiciones, y usted siempre las ha defendido. Qué extraños son los cambios que sufren las mentes de los ordenados en las pruebas del destino. Desconozco adónde te llevará este camino, pero espero que lo que obtenga compense el sacrificio».
languages.original_text: "You and I have clashed more than once over such prohibitions, and now you have become their embodiment. How bizarre are the transformations wrought upon the minds of the ordained in the crucible of fate. I do not know where this path will lead you, but I hope that what you gain from it will be worth the sacrifice."

traits.locale_text: «Usted y yo hemos discutido más de una vez sobre estas prohibiciones, y usted siempre las ha defendido. Qué extraños son los cambios que sufren las mentes de los ordenados en las pruebas del destino. Desconozco adónde te llevará este camino, pero espero que lo que obtenga compense el sacrificio».

languages.text: 「あなたと私は、そうした禁忌をめぐって幾度となく衝突してきました。それが今や、あなたはその禁忌の体現者となられた。運命の坩堝の中で、叙任された者の精神に施される変容とは、なんと奇妙なものでしょう。この道があなたをどこへ導くのか、私には分かりません。しかし、そこから得るものが、払う犠牲に見合うものであることを願っています」
languages.original_text: "You and I have clashed more than once over such prohibitions, and now you have become their embodiment. How bizarre are the transformations wrought upon the minds of the ordained in the crucible of fate. I do not know where this path will lead you, but I hope that what you gain from it will be worth the sacrifice."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたと私は、そうした禁忌をめぐって幾度となく衝突してきました。それが今や、あなたはその禁忌の体現者となられた。運命の坩堝の中で、叙任された者の精神に施される変容とは、なんと奇妙なものでしょう。この道があなたをどこへ導くのか、私には分かりません。しかし、そこから得るものが、払う犠牲に見合うものであることを願っています」

languages.text: “你我曾无数次因为这些禁令争执不休，可如今你自己却成了它们的化身。命运的熔炉竟能将人的心智塑造成这般模样。我不知道这条路最终会把你带向何方，但愿你得到的东西值得你付出的代价。”
languages.original_text: "You and I have clashed more than once over such prohibitions, and now you have become their embodiment. How bizarre are the transformations wrought upon the minds of the ordained in the crucible of fate. I do not know where this path will lead you, but I hope that what you gain from it will be worth the sacrifice."

traits.locale_text: “你我曾无数次因为这些禁令争执不休，可如今你自己却成了它们的化身。命运的熔炉竟能将人的心智塑造成这般模样。我不知道这条路最终会把你带向何方，但愿你得到的东西值得你付出的代价。”

languages.text: "Wir beide sind wegen solcher Verbote schön öfter aneinandergeraten und jetzt verkörpert Ihr sie. Wie bizarr sind die Transformationen im Verstand der Priester im Schmelztiegel des Schicksals. Ich weiß nicht, wohin Euch dieser Weg führen wird, aber ich hoffe, was er Euch beschert wird das Opfer wert sein."
languages.original_text: "You and I have clashed more than once over such prohibitions, and now you have become their embodiment. How bizarre are the transformations wrought upon the minds of the ordained in the crucible of fate. I do not know where this path will lead you, but I hope that what you gain from it will be worth the sacrifice."

Ich weiß nicht, wohin Euch dieser Weg führen wird, aber ich hoffe, was er Euch beschert wird das Opfer wert sein."

languages.text: « Nous avons souvent eu des différends au sujet de telles interdictions, et désormais vous en êtes l'incarnation. Comme il est étrange d'observer les transformations subies par l'esprit dans le creuset du destin. J'ignore où cette voie vous mènera, mais j'espère que ce que vous y gagnerez vaudra le sacrifice. »
languages.original_text: "You and I have clashed more than once over such prohibitions, and now you have become their embodiment. How bizarre are the transformations wrought upon the minds of the ordained in the crucible of fate. I do not know where this path will lead you, but I hope that what you gain from it will be worth the sacrifice."

Comme il est étrange d'observer les transformations subies par l'esprit dans le creuset du destin. J'ignore où cette voie vous mènera, mais j'espère que ce que vous y gagnerez vaudra le sacrifice. »

languages.text: "Sizinle bu tür yasaklar konusunda defalarca çatıştık ve şimdi siz onların vücut bulmuş hâli oldunuz. Kader potasında rahiplerin zihinlerinde yaratılan dönüşümler ne kadar tuhaf. Bu yolun sizi nereye götüreceğini bilmiyorum ama umarım bundan kazanacağınız şeyler fedakârlığınıza değer."
languages.original_text: "You and I have clashed more than once over such prohibitions, and now you have become their embodiment. How bizarre are the transformations wrought upon the minds of the ordained in the crucible of fate. I do not know where this path will lead you, but I hope that what you gain from it will be worth the sacrifice."

Bu yolun sizi nereye götüreceğini bilmiyorum ama umarım bundan kazanacağınız şeyler fedakârlığınıza değer."
